mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO notify_shipment_plan
plan_no, order_fno, order_id, order_item, plan_qty,
logistics_qty ,
hope_date, wl_date, modelno, status, version, delflag, create_time, creator,
#{planNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{orderFno,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{orderId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{orderItem,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{planQty,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{logisticsQty,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{hopeDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{wlDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{modelNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{status,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{version,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{delflag,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{creator,jdbcType=VARCHAR},

insert.foreach:
INSERT INTO notify_shipment_plan
plan_no, order_fno, order_id, order_item, plan_qty,
logistics_qty ,
hope_date, wl_date, modelno, status, version, delflag, create_time, creator,
#{item.planNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.orderFno,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.orderId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.orderItem,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.planQty,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{item.logisticsQty,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{item.hopeDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{item.wlDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{item.modelNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.status,jdbcType=INTEGER}, {item.version,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{item.delflag,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{item.createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{item.creator,jdbcType=VARCHAR},

INSERT INTO notify_shipment_plan_item
plan_no, do_id,
pco_Id ,
qty, status, version, delflag, create_time, creator,
#{item.planNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.doId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{item.pcoId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{item.qty,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{item.status,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{item.version,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{item.delflag,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{item.createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{item.creator,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
